isolation.auth: MCP endpoint auto-authenticated (ALLOW_UNAUTH_LOCAL=true); REST endpoints use x-admin-auth-key header

assertions.title: MCP Tool Surface — All 9 Tools Return Valid Responses

steps.action: Initialize MCP session with proper Accept headers
steps.expected: Session ID returned with protocol version 2024-11-05
steps.observed: Session initialized successfully, mcp-session-id header returned

steps.expected: Response with ok:true and radar object
steps.observed: ok:true, radar created with id=306cabcf-0091-45ef-831a-1b6cbf43ddf9, slug=val-mcp-cross010

steps.expected: Array of radar objects with metadata
steps.observed: Returned array of 11 radars with sourceCount, submissionCount, hasLiveSnapshot, dailySnapshotCount per radar

steps.action: Call radar_add_source with valid source definition object
steps.expected: Response with ok:true and created source
steps.observed: ok:true, source created with id=val-src-001, kind=social, trust_profile populated
ok:true, submissionId=val-thread-001, weight=0.2

steps.expected: Response with ok:true and snapshot object
steps.observed: ok:true, snapshot with snapshot_kind=live, model_count=1, valid as_of_utc

steps.expected: Response with ok:true and daily snapshot
steps.observed: ok:true, snapshot with snapshot_kind=daily, valid as_of_utc
Returned 5 audit events: daily_sealed, live_reduction, packet_submitted, source_added, radar_created

steps.expected: Response with ok:true and collection stats
steps.observed: ok:true, collected=0, duplicates=0, total_fetched=0 (no search results but tool executed without error)

steps.action: Call radar_collect_reddit with subreddits=[worldnews], sort=hot, limit=2
steps.expected: Response with ok:true and collection stats
steps.observed: ok:true, collected=2, duplicates=0, total_fetched=2

steps.action: Call radar_create with invalid input (missing required fields slug and category)
steps.expected: Structured MCP error with validation details
steps.observed: isError:true, structured error message: 'MCP error -32602: Input validation error' with path details for missing slug and category

evidence.network: All 9 tools returned HTTP 200 with well-formed JSON-RPC 2.0 responses via SSE. Invalid input returned structured MCP error -32602 with Zod validation details.

assertions.title: Live Snapshot Updates Without Overwriting Daily

steps.observed: Radar created with id=a356d8bc-2d20-4cb4-b7cc-d2247db0147a

steps.action: Submit first assessment packet (model-alpha, agency=2, nuance=3)
steps.observed: ok:true, submissionId=proc004-thread-1, weight=0.2

steps.action: Reduce live to create initial snapshot
steps.observed: Live snapshot created, model_count=1, snapshot_kind=live
Daily snapshot sealed: id=a356d8bc...:daily:2026-03-13, snapshot_kind=daily, model_count=1, as_of_utc=2026-03-13T03:45:00.497Z

steps.action: Query daily snapshot in DB (before new packet)
steps.observed: Confirmed: snapshot_kind=daily, model_count=1, as_of_utc=2026-03-13 03:45:00.497+00

steps.action: Submit second packet (model-beta, agency=4, nuance=1 — different scores)
steps.observed: ok:true, submissionId=proc004-thread-2, weight=0.2
Live snapshot updated: model_count=2, new as_of_utc=2026-03-13T03:45:15.588Z

steps.action: Query daily snapshot in DB (after live update)
steps.expected: Daily snapshot unchanged — still model_count=1, same as_of_utc
steps.observed: Daily snapshot UNCHANGED: model_count=1, as_of_utc=2026-03-13T03:45:00.497+00, signals={}, branches=[]

evidence.network: POST /mcp tools/call for radar_create, radar_submit_packet (x2), radar_reduce_live (x2), radar_seal_daily_snapshot — all HTTP 200
dbQueries: SELECT ... FROM radar_snapshots WHERE radar_id='a356d8bc...' AND snapshot_kind='daily' — model_count=1 both before and after live update
SELECT ... FROM radar_snapshots WHERE radar_id='a356d8bc...' ORDER BY created_at — shows 3 rows: live(model_count=1), daily(model_count=1), live(model_count=2)

steps.observed: Radar created with id=143f3987-a7f1-4ffa-889e-678f276d06c8
ok:true, submissionId=proc005-thread-1
Live snapshot: model_count=1, snapshot_kind=live

steps.expected: Daily snapshot with snapshot_kind=daily and valid as_of_utc
steps.observed: snapshot_kind=daily, as_of_utc=2026-03-13T03:46:07.094Z, model_count=1

steps.action: Query daily snapshot in DB — verify snapshot_kind and as_of_utc
steps.observed: snapshot_kind=daily, as_of_utc=2026-03-13 03:46:07.094+00 — CONFIRMED

steps.action: Attempt to re-seal the same day's snapshot
steps.observed: isError:true — 'duplicate key value violates unique constraint radar_snapshots_pkey' — re-sealing is rejected

steps.action: Submit new packet (model-delta, different scores) and reduce live
steps.expected: Live snapshot updated, daily remains unchanged
steps.observed: Live snapshot updated to model_count=2; daily snapshot unchanged

steps.action: Query daily snapshot in DB after all subsequent operations
steps.expected: Daily snapshot identical to sealed version
steps.observed: Daily snapshot UNCHANGED: id=...daily:2026-03-13, model_count=1, signals={}, branches=[] — identical to sealed version

evidence.network: POST /mcp tools/call for radar_create, radar_submit_packet (x2), radar_reduce_live (x2), radar_seal_daily_snapshot (x2, second rejected) — all HTTP 200
dbQueries: SELECT ... FROM radar_snapshots WHERE radar_id='143f3987...' AND snapshot_kind='daily' — confirmed snapshot_kind=daily with valid as_of_utc
Re-seal attempt returned duplicate key error — immutability enforced by primary key constraint
After subsequent packet + reduce_live, daily row unchanged (model_count=1, signals={}, branches=[])

frictions.description: MCP Streamable HTTP requires Accept: 'application/json, text/event-stream' header — initial request without this header was rejected with 'Not Acceptable' error
frictions.resolution: Added Accept header to all requests

frictions.description: MCP Streamable HTTP requires session initialization before tool calls — initial tool call without initialization returned 'Server not initialized' error
frictions.resolution: Sent initialize request first, captured mcp-session-id from response headers, included it in subsequent requests

frictions.description: radar_collect_bluesky returned 0 results for searchQuery='climate' — Bluesky search API may have returned empty results, but tool executed without error
frictions.resolution: Tool returned well-formed response with ok:true and zero counts — valid behavior when search yields no results

frictions.description: Tool parameter names differ from task prompt assumptions — e.g., radar_reduce_live expects 'radarId' (not 'radar_slug'), radar_add_source expects nested 'source' object, radar_collect_bluesky expects 'searchQuery' (not 'query')
frictions.resolution: Read tool schemas from source code (main.ts) to determine correct parameter names

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. VAL-CROSS-010: All 9 MCP tools (radar_create, radar_list, radar_add_source, radar_submit_packet, radar_reduce_live, radar_seal_daily_snapshot, radar_get_audit_log, radar_collect_bluesky, radar_collect_reddit) return well-formed responses; invalid inputs produce structured MCP errors, not crashes. VAL-PROC-004: Live snapshots update independently (model_count 1→2) without modifying sealed daily snapshot (model_count stayed 1). VAL-PROC-005: Daily snapshot sealing produces immutable record with snapshot_kind='daily' and valid as_of_utc; re-sealing is rejected (unique constraint); subsequent operations leave daily unchanged.
